---
title: "EMW"
output:
  html_document:
    fig_width: 1
include: 
  - .img-circle {border-radius: 50%;}
---


<style>
  .title{
    display: none;
  }
</style>

<style>
.column-left{
  float: left;
  width: 40%;
  text-align: center;
}
.column-main{
  display: inline-block;
  width: 60%;
  text-align: left;
}
</style>

<style>
.card {
  box-shadow: 0 4px 8px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
  max-width: 300px;
  margin: auto;
  text-align: center;
}
</style>

<br> <br>

::: column-left
::: card
<img src="emily_square.jpg" alt="Emily Malcolm-White headshot" class="img-circle" align="middle" width="200" height="200" style=" margin: 20px 20px 20px 20px;"/>

### **Emily Malcolm-White** (she/her)

<p> Faculty <br>
Middlebury College <br>
Department of Mathematics & Statistics</p>

<i class="fa fa-envelope"></i><a href = "mailto: emalcolmwhite@middlebury.edu"> emalcolmwhite\@middlebury.edu </a>
:::
:::

<div class="column-main">

### **Hi! 👋**

I am an educator and student support specialist with a love for developing and teaching mathematics, statistics, and data science courses.

I believe that STEM education should be inclusive and accessible for all. I hope to minimize barriers for all students, including those with varying academic backgrounds, those with responsibilities outside of academics, and those with disabilities. I take the time to learn about innovative and effective teaching pedagogy and like to keep trying new things to maximize my effectiveness as an instructor.

I am currently Faculty in Mathematics and Statistics at Middlebury College where I focus on teaching introductory mathematics, statistics, and data science courses.

#### Education

  <ul class="fa-ul">
    <li><span class="fa-li"><i class="fas fa-graduation-cap"></i></span>MSc in Statistics</li>
    <p><i>University of Victoria</i> </p>
    <li><span class="fa-li"><i class="fas fa-graduation-cap"></i></span>BSc in Applied Mathematics and Statistics</li>
    <p><i>University of Guelph</i> </p>
  </ul>
